title: NoMobs
description: A lightweight Minecraft Paper Plugin that stops mobs from spawning.
body:
# 🚫 No Mobs
[![Minecraft Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21+-brightgreen?style=for-the-badge)](https://www.minecraft.net/)
[![Paper](https://img.shields.io/badge/Paper%20&%20Forks-Supported-blue?style=for-the-badge)](https://papermc.io/)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-GPLv3-red?style=for-the-badge)](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.html)
[![Status](https://img.shields.io/badge/Optimized-100%25-success?style=for-the-badge)](#)

---

## ✨ Overview
**No Mobs** is a super-optimized plugin for **Paper 1.21+** (and forks) that completely **disables all mob spawning**.  
Perfect for:
- Creative servers 🎨
- Lobby / Hub worlds 🏰
- Performance-focused servers ⚡

---

## 🎯 Features
- Blocks **all mob types** (hostile, passive, water, ambient, nether, etc.)
- **Zero-lag design** – uses minimal resources
- Configurable toggle (`enabled: true/false`)
- Easy admin commands (`/nomobs enable|disable`)
- Permission-based control (`nomobs.admin`)

---

## ⚙️ Configuration
```yaml
# The No Mob Plugin config
enabled: true
```
## 🖥️ Commands

| Command          | Description               | Permission    |
|------------------|---------------------------|---------------|
| `/nomobs`         | Show plugin info + status | (any)         |
| `/nomobs enable`  | Enable mob blocking       | `nomobs.admin` |
| `/nomobs disable` | Disable mob blocking      | `nomobs.admin` |


## 🔑 Permissions


| Permission   | Description               | Default |
|--------------|---------------------------|---------|
| `nomobs.admin`| Manage plugin + toggling  | OP      |

---

## 📥 Installation
1. Download the latest release.
2. Drop `NoMobs-x.x.jar` into your `plugins/` folder.
3. Restart the server.
